headline: Did Genuine Parts' NAPA–Motion Split and Dividend Hike Just Recast GPC's Investment Narrative?
summary: In February 2026, Genuine Parts Company reported fourth-quarter 2025 sales of US$6,009.42 million but moved from net income to a net loss, while also outlining 2026 guidance, reaffirming robust M&A plans of US$300 million to US$350 million and approving a 3.2% increase to its long-running quarterly dividend. On the same day, Genuine Parts also announced a planned separation of its NAPA automotive and Motion industrial businesses by early 2027, a move that, alongside analyst upgrades, is...
